create or replace function setup_vector_store(table_name text) 
returns void 
language plpgsql 
as $outer$ 
begin 
    -- Drop the existing function if it exists
    execute 'drop function if exists match_strategies(int, jsonb)';
    
    -- Create the table
    execute format('create table %I ( 
        id bigint primary key generated always as identity, 
        description text, 
        metadata jsonb,
        embedding vector
    )', table_name);
    
    -- Create the search function with proper escaping
    execute format($fmt$
        create or replace function match_strategies ( 
            match_count int default null, 
            filter jsonb default '{}'::jsonb 
        ) 
        returns table ( 
            id bigint, 
            description text, 
            metadata jsonb, 
            similarity float 
        ) 
        language plpgsql 
        as $inner$ 
        begin 
            return query 
            select 
                t.id, 
                t.description, 
                t.metadata, 
                1::float as similarity 
            from %I t
            where t.metadata @> filter 
            order by t.embedding <=> query_embedding 
            limit match_count; 
        end;
        $inner$;
    $fmt$, table_name);
end; 
$outer$

WITH date_range AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    displayname,
    age,
    GREATEST(creationdate::date, '2010-01-01'::date) AS start_date,
    LEAST(lastaccessdate::date, '2014-12-31'::date) AS end_date
  FROM users
  WHERE creationdate <= '2014-12-31'
    AND lastaccessdate >= '2010-01-01'
),
date_series AS (
  SELECT 
    dr.id,
    dr.displayname,
    dr.age,
    generate_series(dr.start_date, dr.end_date, '1 day'::interval)::date AS day
  FROM date_range dr
  WHERE dr.start_date <= dr.end_date
),
non_working_days AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    displayname,
    age,
    COUNT(*) AS non_working_day_count
  FROM date_series
  WHERE 
    -- Weekend days (Saturday = 6, Sunday = 0)
    EXTRACT(DOW FROM day) IN (0, 6)
    OR
    -- Specific holidays
    (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM day) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM day) = 1)  -- New Year's Day
    OR
    (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM day) = 7 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM day) = 4)  -- Independence Day
    OR
    (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM day) = 11 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM day) = 11) -- Veterans Day
    OR
    (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM day) = 12 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM day) = 25) -- Christmas Day
  GROUP BY id, displayname, age
)
SELECT 
  id,
  displayname,
  age,
  non_working_day_count AS TotalNonWorkingDays
FROM non_working_days
ORDER BY id

        name, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST) AS item, 
        CONCAT(label, ' (', tag1, ')') AS value 
    FROM (
        SELECT id, name, 'Colors' AS label, colors AS tag1 
        FROM cards 
        WHERE id = 1
        UNION ALL 
        SELECT id, name, 'ManaCost' AS label, manacost AS tag1 
        FROM cards 
        WHERE id = 1
    ) AS src
) AS src

WITH cte AS (
    SELECT 
        m1.member_id AS member1_id,
        m1.first_name AS member1_first_name,
        m1.last_name AS member1_last_name,
        m2.member_id AS member2_id,
        m2.first_name AS member2_first_name,
        m2.last_name AS member2_last_name,
        e.event_date,
        e.event_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY m1.member_id, m2.member_id 
            ORDER BY e.event_date DESC NULLS LAST
        ) AS rn 
    FROM attendance AS a1 
    JOIN attendance AS a2 
        ON a1.link_to_event = a2.link_to_event 
        AND a1.link_to_member < a2.link_to_member 
    JOIN member AS m1 ON a1.link_to_member = m1.member_id 
    JOIN member AS m2 ON a2.link_to_member = m2.member_id 
    JOIN event AS e ON a1.link_to_event = e.event_id
) 
SELECT 
    member1_id,
    member1_first_name,
    member1_last_name,
    member2_id,
    member2_first_name,
    member2_last_name,
    event_date AS last_shared_event_date,
    event_name AS last_shared_event_name
FROM cte 
WHERE rn = 1 
ORDER BY event_date ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

WITH RECURSIVE HierarchyCTE AS (
    -- Base case: Leaf nodes
    SELECT 
        entityid, 
        parentid, 
        emission,
        CAST(emission AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cumulative_emission,
        pctcontribution
    FROM tree_table
    WHERE entityid NOT IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT parentid 
        FROM tree_table 
        WHERE parentid IS NOT NULL
    )
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: Parents
    SELECT 
        t.entityid,
        t.parentid,
        t.emission,
        t.emission AS cumulative_emission,
        t.pctcontribution
    FROM tree_table t
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM tree_table t2 WHERE t2.parentid = t.entityid
    )
),
AggregatedChildren AS (
    -- Sum up weighted contributions from all children for each parent
    SELECT 
        cte.parentid AS entityid,
        SUM(cte.cumulative_emission * (cte.pctcontribution / 100.0)) AS children_contribution
    FROM HierarchyCTE cte
    WHERE cte.parentid IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY cte.parentid
)
SELECT 
    h.entityid,
    h.parentid,
    h.cumulative_emission + COALESCE(ac.children_contribution, 0) AS total_emission
FROM HierarchyCTE h
LEFT JOIN AggregatedChildren ac ON h.entityid = ac.entityid
ORDER BY h.entityid

SELECT "element", "record"
FROM "frpm_record"

UNION ALL

SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE("element", '_(lowgrade|highgrade)$', '') || '_rate' AS element,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' THEN "record" END) /
    NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_highgrade' THEN "record" END), 0) AS "record"
FROM "frpm_record"
WHERE "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' OR "element" LIKE '%_highgrade'
GROUP BY REGEXP_REPLACE("element", '_(lowgrade|highgrade)$', '')

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
),

"applicable_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        G."ID",
        G."GROUPCHOICE",
        G."DATECHOICE",
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        C."EFFECTIVE_DATE",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY G."ID", G."GROUPCHOICE", G."DATECHOICE" 
            ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC
        ) AS RN
    FROM "grp_choices" G
    JOIN "credits" C ON G."ID" = C."ID" AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
)

SELECT
    "ID",
    "GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN "ARTCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN "BIZCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN "HUMCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN "NATCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN "TEKCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN "GENCRED"
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "CREDIT_VALUE"
FROM "applicable_credits"
WHERE RN = 1
ORDER BY "ID", "GROUPCHOICE"

WITH tbl AS
  (SELECT TO_DATE('12.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS act_date
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('31.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('13.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy),
     t2 AS
  (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS act_month,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_2
   FROM tbl t
   GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
            TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')
   ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')),
     grid AS
  (SELECT t1.activation_month,
          t1.rn_1,
          t2.act_month,
          t2.rn_2
   FROM
     (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS activation_month,
             TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_1
      FROM tbl t
      GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
               TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')
      ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')) t1
   LEFT JOIN t2 ON (t1.rn_1 <= t2.rn_2)),
     molecule_activity AS
  (SELECT m."molecule_id",
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_date
   FROM tbl t
   CROSS JOIN "molecule" m
   WHERE m."molecule_id" IN
     (SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "bond"
      UNION SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "atom"))
SELECT g.activation_month,
       g.act_month,
       g.rn_1,
       g.rn_2,
       CASE
           WHEN g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 THEN
                  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id")
                   FROM molecule_activity ma
                   WHERE ma.act_date = g.rn_1)
           ELSE
                  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id")
                   FROM molecule_activity ma
                   WHERE ma.act_date BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2)
       END AS active_molecules
FROM grid g
ORDER BY g.rn_1, g.rn_2
